recommendations.title: Deception
recommendations.overview: As a corporate auditor who works in a number of different offices, Jonathan McQuarry wanders without an anchor among New York's power brokers. A chance meeting with charismatic lawyer Wyatt Bose leads to Jonathan's introduction to The List, an underg

recommendations.title: The Man Who Sleeps
recommendations.overview: A young student decides to have no more interaction with the world than is needed to minimally sustain life. His increasingly automaton-like behavior is coupled with a strange clarity of insight about the world around him.

recommendations.title: In Your Eyes
recommendations.overview: Two seemingly unconnected souls from different corners of the United States make a telepathic bond that allows them to see, hear and feel the other's experiences, creating a bond that apparently can't be broken.

recommendations.title: Children of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Six children are found spread through out the world that not only have enormous intelligence, but identical intelligence and have a strange bond to each other.

recommendations.title: To the Bone
recommendations.overview: A young woman dealing with anorexia meets an unconventional doctor who challenges her to face her condition and embrace life.

recommendations.title: Light of My Life
recommendations.overview: Parent and child journey through the outskirts of society a decade after a pandemic has wiped out half the world's population. As a father struggles to protect his child, their bond—and the character of humanity—is tested.

recommendations.title: I Am Mother
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl is raised underground by a robot "Mother", designed to repopulate the earth following an extinction event. But their unique bond is threatened when an inexplicable stranger arrives with alarming news.

recommendations.title: The Fallout
recommendations.overview: In the wake of a school tragedy, Vada, Mia and Quinton form a unique and dynamic bond as they navigate the never linear, often confusing journey to heal in a world that feels forever changed.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Hyena Road
recommendations.overview: Three different men, three different worlds, three different wars – all stand at the intersection of modern warfare – a murky world of fluid morality where all is not as it seems. A unique and dramatic look at the Canadian Army in Afghanistan.
